name: Marinara (Tomato) Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, and green bell pepper. Cook until the onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in oregano, parsley, basil, marjoram, salt, pepper, and cayenne.
4. Cook for another 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add tomato sauce, tomato paste, and chopped tomatoes to the pan.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1½ to 2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens and flavors meld together.
